name: Settings

task.description: Build an account settings page for 'Workspace' at 1920px wide using a two-pane layout: LEFT a settings nav (220px) with 5 items (Profile, Account, Notifications, Billing, Security), 'Notifications' active. RIGHT a content pane showing the Notifications settings as THREE grouped sections ('Email', 'Push', 'SMS'), each a card with a header and 3-4 labeled toggle rows (label + description on the left, an on/off toggle switch on the right) - at least 10 toggle rows total, with a clear mix of on and off states. A sticky footer action bar within the content pane has 'Cancel' and a primary 'Save changes' button right-aligned. Responsive: at 375px the left nav becomes a horizontal scrollable tab strip on top and the toggle rows stack label-above-control.
requirements: A left settings nav (~220px) lists all five items with 'Notifications' highlighted as active
The content pane shows three grouped cards: Email, Push, SMS
There are at least 10 toggle rows total across the three cards
Each toggle row has a left-aligned label (+description) and a right-aligned on/off switch in a consistent column
Both on and off toggle states are visually distinct and both appear among the rows
A sticky action bar shows 'Cancel' and a primary 'Save changes' button, right-aligned
The toggle switches all share one consistent style (repetition)
On desktop the toggle controls align in a single right-hand column across all rows
At 375px the left nav becomes a top tab strip and toggle rows stack the control below the label
The primary 'Save changes' button is visually higher-contrast than 'Cancel'

Notifications

Manage how and when you receive notifications from Workspace

Email Notifications

Control which email notifications you receive

Project updates
Get notified when projects you're involved in are updated
Team mentions
Receive emails when someone mentions you or your team
Weekly digest
A summary of your workspace activity sent every Monday
Marketing emails
Product updates, tips, and promotional content

Push Notifications

Manage browser and mobile push notifications

Real-time messages
Instant notifications for direct messages and urgent updates
Task assignments
Get notified when tasks are assigned to you
Meeting reminders
Reminders 15 minutes before scheduled meetings

SMS Notifications

Text message alerts for critical updates

Security alerts
Important security notifications and login alerts
Critical system updates
Urgent notifications about system maintenance or outages
Emergency contacts
Notifications when team members mark something as urgent

trace.output:
Let me build a comprehensive account settings page for 'Workspace' with all the specified requirements. I'll create a two-pane layout with a left nav and right content pane showing Notifications settings. Key requirements: - 1920px wide viewport - Left nav: 220px, 5 items, 'Notifications' active - Right pane: 3 cards (Email, Push, SMS) with toggle rows - At least 10 toggle rows total - Mix of on/off states - Sticky footer with Cancel and Save Changes buttons - Responsive at 375px with consistent toggle styling Now I'm defining the color palette and component styles: dark navy sidebar with purple accent for active states, white content cards with subtle borders, and pill-shaped toggles in green for enabled and gray for disabled states. Writing the HTML structure... the layout: - Full height viewport with left nav fixed and right content scrollable - Or use flexbox with the nav sticky Actually let me think about the layout more carefully: - The page is 1920px wide - Left nav: 220px, sticky/fixed - Right content: fills the rest - Sticky footer action bar within the content pane (not the whole viewport) For the sticky footer in the content pane, I'll use a flex column on the right side with the content area being scrollable and the footer sticky at the bottom. Structure: ```
(display: flex, height: 100vh)
(220px, fixed height)
(flex-column, flex: 1, overflow hidden)
(flex: 1, overflow-y: auto, padding)
(sticky footer)
``` I'll also add a top header bar for app branding. For the toggles, I'm building CSS-only switches using hidden checkbox inputs with styled pill-shaped tracks and thumbs that animate between states. Now I'm setting up the notification preferences with two main cards—one for email notifications with four toggles covering weekly newsletters, product updates, marketing emails, and account activity, and another for push notifications with three toggles for messages, mentions, and task assignments. Writing the stylesheet... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Adding mobile styles... Writing navigation items... Writing navigation and content layout... Building the toggle switches... Writing the notification settings card... Building the notification toggles... Writing the SMS card layout... Writing notification toggles... Now I'm verifying the layout structure handles scrolling correctly—the main content area needs to scroll independently while keeping the navigation and action bar fixed in place. I should switch to using `flex: 1` on the main layout instead of the height calculation, and I'm realizing the content area will be quite wide on a 1920px viewport, so I need to constrain it with a reasonable max-width to keep the cards from stretching too far. ```html Workspace — Notifications Settings

Looking at the issues, the core problem is the `overflow: hidden` on `.main-layout` combined with the flex height setup is clipping the SMS card from view in the renderer. I'll fix the scroll architecture, make the active nav state more visually prominent, and confirm all 12 toggle rows are intact.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Workspace — Notifications Settings</title>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
    html, body { height: 100%; }

    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif;
      background: #F1F3F7;
      color: #111827;
      min-height: 100vh;
    }

    /* TOP HEADER */
    .top-header {
      height: 58px;
      background: #16192B;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 0 32px;
      position: sticky;
      top: 0;
      z-index: 300;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    }
    .logo {
      font-size: 18px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #fff;
      letter-spacing: -0.5px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .logo-mark {
      width: 28px;
      height: 28px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6D5BFF 0%, #A78BFA 100%);
      border-radius: 7px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }
    .logo-mark svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
    .logo .accent { color: #A78BFA; }

    /* MOBILE TAB STRIP — hidden on desktop */
    .mobile-nav-strip { display: none; }

    /* MAIN LAYOUT — page scrolls naturally */
    .main-layout {
      display: flex;
      min-height: calc(100vh - 58px);
    }

    /* LEFT NAV — sticky so it stays visible while content scrolls */
    .left-nav {
      width: 220px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      background: #16192B;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      padding: 28px 0;
      border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
      position: sticky;
      top: 58px;
      height: calc(100vh - 58px);
      overflow-y: auto;
    }
    .nav-section-label {
      font-size: 10.5px;
      font-weight: 700;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      color: #4B5563;
      padding: 0 22px 14px;
    }
    .nav-item {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 11px;
      padding: 11px 22px;
      font-size: 13.5px;
      font-weight: 500;
      color: #9CA3AF;
      text-decoration: none;
      cursor: pointer;
      border-left: 3px solid transparent;
      transition: background 0.13s, color 0.13s;
    }
    .nav-item:hover { background: rgba(109,91,255,0.09); color: #E5E7EB; }

    /* ACTIVE NAV — solid distinct background for clear highlight */
    .nav-item.active {
      background: #6D5BFF;
      color: #ffffff;
      border-left-color: #A78BFA;
      font-weight: 700;
    }
    .nav-item.active svg { stroke: #fff; }
    .nav-item svg { width: 17px; height: 17px; flex-shrink: 0; }
    .nav-badge {
      margin-left: auto;
      background: #fff;
      color: #6D5BFF;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 800;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 1px 7px;
    }

    /* CONTENT WRAPPER */
    .content-wrapper {
      flex: 1;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      min-width: 0;
    }

    /* SCROLLABLE CONTENT AREA — grows naturally, no overflow clipping */
    .content-area {
      flex: 1;
      padding: 44px 72px 32px;
    }
    .content-inner { max-width: 860px; }

    /* PAGE HEADER */
    .page-header { margin-bottom: 32px; }
    .page-breadcrumb { font-size: 12px; color: #9CA3AF; margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 500; }
    .page-breadcrumb .crumb-sep { color: #6B7280; }
    .page-title {
      font-size: 26px;
      font-weight: 800;
      color: #111827;
      letter-spacing: -0.4px;
      line-height: 1.2;
    }
    .page-subtitle { font-size: 14px; color: #6B7280; margin-top: 6px; line-height: 1.5; }

    /* SETTINGS CARDS */
    .settings-card {
      background: #ffffff;
      border: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
      border-radius: 14px;
      margin-bottom: 24px;
      overflow: hidden;
      box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    }
    .card-header {
      padding: 18px 28px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #F3F4F6;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      background: #FAFAFA;
    }
    .card-icon {
      width: 38px;
      height: 38px;
      border-radius: 10px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6D5BFF 0%, #9B8FFF 100%);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .card-icon svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; }
    .card-title { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; }
    .card-desc { font-size: 12.5px; color: #9CA3AF; margin-top: 2px; }

    /* TOGGLE ROWS */
    .toggle-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 18px 28px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #F3F4F6;
      gap: 24px;
    }
    .toggle-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
    .toggle-row-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
    .toggle-label { font-size: 13.5px; font-weight: 600; color: #111827; }
    .toggle-desc { font-size: 12.5px; color: #9CA3AF; margin-top: 3px; line-height: 1.5; }

    /* Fixed-width column keeps all toggles aligned in one right-hand column */
    .toggle-col {
      flex-shrink: 0;
      width: 100px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      gap: 10px;
    }
    .row-status {
      font-size: 11px;
      font-weight: 600;
      border-radius: 20px;
      padding: 2px 8px;
    }
    .row-status.on  { background: #EEF2FF; color: #4338CA; }
    .row-status.off { background: #F3F4F6; color: #9CA3AF; }

    /* TOGGLE SWITCH — shared consistent style */
    .toggle-switch {
      position: relative;
      display: inline-block;
      width: 46px;
      height: 26px;
      cursor: pointer;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .toggle-switch input {
      position: absolute;
      opacity: 0;
      width: 0;
      height: 0;
    }
    .toggle-track {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: #D1D5DB;
      border-radius: 13px;
      transition: background 0.22s ease;
    }
    .toggle-thumb {
      position: absolute;
      top: 3px;
      left: 3px;
      width: 20px;
      height: 20px;
      background: #fff;
      border-radius: 50%;
      box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
      transition: transform 0.22s ease;
    }
    .toggle-switch input:checked + .toggle-track { background: #6D5BFF; }
    .toggle-switch input:checked + .toggle-track .toggle-thumb { transform: translateX(20px); }
    .toggle-switch:focus-within .toggle-track { outline: 2px solid #6D5BFF; outline-offset: 2px; }

    /* STICKY ACTION BAR — sticks to bottom of viewport */
    .action-bar {
      position: sticky;
      bottom: 0;
      z-index: 200;
      background: #fff;
      border-top: 1px solid #E5E7EB;
      padding: 14px 72px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      gap: 12px;
    }
    .btn {
      padding: 9px 22px;
      border-radius: 8px;
      font-size: 13.5px;
      font-weight: 600;
      cursor: pointer;
      border: none;
      transition: all 0.15s;
      line-height: 1.4;
      font-family: inherit;
    }
    .btn-cancel {
      background: transparent;
      color: #374151;
      border: 1.5px solid #D1D5DB;
    }
    .btn-cancel:hover { background: #F9FAFB; border-color: #9CA3AF; }
    .btn-primary {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6D5BFF 0%, #9B8FFF 100%);
      color: #fff;
      box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(109,91,255,0.40);
      padding: 10px 26px;
      border: none;
    }
    .btn-primary:hover {
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5D4AEF 0%, #8B7FEF 100%);
      box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(109,91,255,0.50);
      transform: translateY(-1px);
    }

    /* RESPONSIVE 375px */
    @media (max-wid
